steps.title: Introduce the mechanism
steps.content: The first clause makes a complete statement about cells with identical DNA developing different functions. The following material explains that statement by contrasting the genome with the epigenome.

steps.title: Signal explanation clearly
steps.content: Choice A uses only a comma, Choice B gives no punctuation, and Choice C adds an illogical and before a whereas contrast. A colon best introduces the explanation. The answer is D.
